creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Could the exp-run be done with lang/gcc10-devel? https://bugs.debian.org/cgi-bin/bugreport.cgi?bug=957565 seems to point out that the openmpi issue may have been fixed recently, it might also fix other build problems.

This will let us switch once 10.3.0 is out, or just backport the necessary patch.
